title:
[Closed] Communications and Fundraising Coordinator (Marketing & PR
Focus) Position
content:
Tactical Tech is seeking an engaging storyteller with creativity
and a passion for communications, marketing, and business development.
sourceDescription: Tactical Tech is an international NGO that engages with citizens and civil-society organisations to explore and mitigate the impacts of technology on society.

title: Annual Report 2024
content:
In 2024, Tactical Tech responded to a rapidly evolving digital
landscape and its accelerating socio-political and environmental impacts,
driven largely by the widespread adoption of AI technologies. With a
forward-looking, creative, and collaborative approach, we empowered civil
society, communities, and organizations to better understand and address the
growing influence of digital technologies on democracy, society, and everyday
life.
sourceDescription: Tactical Tech is an international NGO that engages with citizens and civil-society organisations to explore and mitigate the impacts of technology on society.

title:
Open Call for a Volunteer to join our communications team - European
Solidarity Corps Programme
content:
Tactical Tech is opening a year-long paid volunteer opportunity for
an individual who wants to learn more about creative interventions that
champion a digitally resilient society and join our communications and
partnerships team in the Berlin-based office.
sourceDescription: Tactical Tech is an international NGO that engages with citizens and civil-society organisations to explore and mitigate the impacts of technology on society.

title: In The Loop July 2025
content:
In the Loop, Tactical Tech’s monthly newsletter, includes new
releases, open calls, job opportunities, information about our partners,
events, recommended resources and more.
sourceDescription: Tactical Tech is an international NGO that engages with citizens and civil-society organisations to explore and mitigate the impacts of technology on society.

title:
Call for Participants: To AI or not to AI - the uses of AI in digital
investigations: hands on training in emerging tools and tactics
content:
Not sure if, when, or how to use AI in your investigative work?
Join us in Berlin, November 12–14, 2025, for To AI or Not to AI – The Uses of
AI in Digital Investigations, an in-person training focused on practical
skills and methods for navigating AI in digital investigations.
sourceDescription: Tactical Tech is an international NGO that engages with citizens and civil-society organisations to explore and mitigate the impacts of technology on society.
